channel.title: PubLedge — Updates
channel.description: Registry updates and protocol changelog for PubLedge — the open recordkeeping protocol for fact-specific written interpretations between two parties.

item.title: PubLedge Protocol v0.1.0-pre published
item.description: The PubLedge specification is published as v0.1.0-pre. Entity model bound to Semantic Arts gist; required frontmatter and body structure; permanent identifiers (PL-{KIND}-NNNN); hash-pinned integrity via MANIFEST.yaml; mandatory drafting-in-public disclaimer; supersession discipline.

item.title: PubLedge Prior Art survey published
item.description: Descriptive survey of the closest precedents PubLedge draws from: Utah Regulatory Sandbox (§63M-17), SEC No-Action Letters, IRS Private Letter Rulings, CFPB Advisory Opinion Program, Utah Court Forms Library, and ancillary programs.

item.title: Five Utah JIA + RMA templates added
item.description: Initial template set: three JIAs covering Utah Code §13-72a-201/202/203 (mental-health chatbot data protection, advertising, first-session disclosure), and two RMAs covering AI sandbox mitigation and §13-75-104 GenAI safe-harbor enrollment.

item.title: PL-JIA-0001 — Utah Mental-Health Chatbot First-Session Disclosure
item.description: First registry instance: a stub Utah JIA reading §13-72a-203 to require disclosure on first session and re-disclosure after extended user inactivity. Status: draft. Disclaimer: suggested prior art; not official OAIP output.
